violations.text: The cutting boards attached to prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the sides of the fryer and fanguards in walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: -walls, vents and ceilings in kitchen -kitchen hood (interior and vents) The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fans and inside of the 1 door reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed on the Salad prep cooler in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023

The floor in the kitchen area by the prep sink and by the drain in front of the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. - During time of inspection no employee was certified in food safety. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Meatballs were observed held at 125 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. - Meatballs were held >2 hours, meatballs were voluntarily disposed of. Reheating process and hot holding process was revisited with establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
Single service items (pizza boxes) are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed on the Salad prep cooler in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler (blower unit, shelving, and floor) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The floor in the kitchen area by the prep sink and by the drain in front of the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
